headline: WeRide (NasdaqGM:WRD) Stock Valuation After New European Robotaxi Deals And Slovakia L4 Approval
summary: WeRide (NasdaqGM:WRD) is back in focus after partnering with Uber Technologies and AVOMO to roll out Spain’s first commercial Robotaxi pilot in Madrid, extending its European reach into autonomous ride hailing. See our latest analysis for WeRide. Despite the Madrid Robotaxi pilot and planned rollout of Level 4 services in Slovakia, WeRide’s recent momentum has been weak, with the 1 month share price return down 19.35% and the year to date share price return down 34.29%, while the 1 year total...

headline: Why Wells Fargo Is Warning That Surging AI Token Costs Is a Death Knell for Hyperscaler Stocks Like Meta and Microsoft
summary: As AI token costs surge, Wells Fargo warns that hyperscalers like Meta and Microsoft could face growing pressure on the very technology driving their explosive growth.

headline: The ‘AI superstar’ CEO behind a self-driving truck unicorn on why Gen Z is a better hiring bet than industry veterans
summary: Raquel Urtasun, co-founder of autonomous truck startup Waabi, talks to Fortune about unicorn hiring in the AI age: “Fear can paralyze your ability to embrace that change.”

headline: SpaceX, Super Micro Computer, Micron And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week
